goal: Generate missing card illustrations for the Card Gallery (图鉴) Phase 2, focusing on 杏林馆, 稗言社, 养真院, and 筹天阁.
constraints: Use V9 ink-wash aesthetic for all card images.
Follow naming conventions: faction_name + number for Phase 2 cards.
Update assets.ts to support newly generated extensions (PNG/JPG).
Ensure CARD_NAME_TO_IMAGE_ID in assets.ts is updated.
